name: Lumen Method Grid Solver
formula_reference: CIBSE SLL Code for Lighting 2012; BS EN 12464-1:2021 Clause 5
implementation_note: Deterministic Python: computes baseline luminaire grid (rows × cols, x/y positions, spacing) for a rectangular room from room dims, ceiling height, target lux, design lumens, UF, MF, ceiling-grid module, and SHR_max. Returns positions list + spacing trace.
